name: Bohemian Apple Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat egg yolks slightly. Beat in milk and cooking oil.
3. Add the egg yolk mixture to the flour mixture all at once. Stir just until combined, but still slightly loose.
4. Stir in the chopped apple.
5. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form (peaks will stand straight).
6. Gently fold beaten egg whites into batter, leaving a few fluffs of egg white. Do not overmix.
7. Pour some of the batter onto grids of a preheated lightly greased waffle iron.
8. Close lid quickly and do not open during baking. Bake according to manufacturer's directions.
9. When done, use a fork to lift waffle off grid. Repeat with remaining batter.
10. Serve with warm maple syrup and butter. Top with fresh fruit if desired.
